name: aiv
description: AIV — Enterprise AI SEO & AI Visibility SaaS

scripts.db:generate: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:push: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma db push
scripts.db:studio: cd apps/web && pnpm exec prisma studio
scripts.worker:dev: cd apps/web && pnpm exec tsx watch --env-file=.env.local src/lib/queue/worker.ts
scripts.worker:start: cd apps/web && pnpm exec tsx src/lib/queue/worker.ts
